ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Closing Of Estate
Off Calendar May-22-2018 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The status of closing estate is Off Calendar. The court noted the Petition for Final Distribution was filed.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Shirley Le. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.

Petition By Executors To Establish Estates Claim Of Ownership To Properties And For Order Directing Their Transfer To And From Estate
Off Calendar Nov-20-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Craid Kronman for and with (co-trustees) Taft Loo & Marilyn Loo. Evelyn Loo also present.

The Court asked counsel why he doesn't file Quit Claim Deeds. Mr. Kronman stated that he wanted the Court's blessing so that there would be no issues later, that he will also do a Quit Claim Deed, that this property came in late in the game and that they plan to record the order and the do a Quit Claim Deed. The Court asked about 538 3rd Avenue property and the request and indicated that 1/4 of the property is already in the trust. Mr. Kronman stated that the trust was never funded, that they are being cautious and that they plan to do a Quit Claim Deed. The Court stated that if the property has been transferred into the trust it is in there and that it does not see how the Court can order what is being asked since the property is already in the trust. Mr. Kronman stated that the Court can scratch the Third Avenue property and just put in Parker. The Court stated that it can do that and asked about Vallejo. Mr. Kronman stated that Vallejo belongs 1/2 to Mr. Loo and 1/2 to Mrs. Loo's estate that when they wrap up the estate it will go into the trust. The Court stated that based on the present petition it cannot grant the order in regards to Third Avenue but that it will Grant the Petition by Executors to Establish Estates Claim of Ownership to Properties and for Order Directing their Transfer to and from Estate as to the Parker Avenue property only,(subject to review of the order).

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Nuque. (Not Reported)
